aiCheck.title: AI Pronunciation Check
aiCheck.desc: Analyze your recitation with AI and get instant feedback.

idgam_meal_gunne.title: Idgham Ma'al Ghunnah
idgam_meal_gunne.rule: If Sakin Noon or Tanween is followed by one of the letters (ي م ن و), they are merged with a nasal sound.

0.explanation: Noon meets Ya, so Idgham occurs.

1.explanation: Noon meets Meem, so Idgham occurs.

idgam-bila-gunne.title: Idgham Bila Ghunnah
idgam-bila-gunne.rule: If Sakin Noon or Tanween is followed by Lam (ل) or Ra (ر), they are merged without a nasal sound.

0.explanation: Noon meets Ra, so Idgham without Ghunnah occurs.

1.explanation: Tanween meets Lam, so Idgham without Ghunnah occurs.

ihfa.title: Ikhfa
ihfa.rule: If Sakin Noon or Tanween is followed by an Ikhfa letter, the Noon sound is concealed with a nasal sound.

0.explanation: Sakin Noon meets Za, so Ikhfa occurs.

1.explanation: Sakin Noon meets Shin, so Ikhfa occurs.

izhar.title: Izhar
izhar.rule: If Sakin Noon or Tanween is followed by a throat letter, the Noon sound is pronounced clearly.

0.explanation: Sakin Noon meets Kha, so Izhar occurs.

1.explanation: Tanween meets Alif, so Izhar occurs.

iklab.title: Iqlab
iklab.rule: If Sakin Noon or Tanween is followed by Ba (ب), the Noon sound changes to Meem (م) with a nasal sound.

0.explanation: Sakin Noon meets Ba, so it converts to Meem.

1.explanation: Tanween meets Ba, so it converts to Meem.

kalkale.title: Qalqalah
kalkale.rule: When Qalqalah letters (ق ط ب ج د) are Sakin (have Sukoon), they are pronounced with an echoing sound.

0.explanation: Qaf is Sakin, so Qalqalah occurs.

1.explanation: Dal is Sakin, so Qalqalah occurs.
